From an SRS for In Proposal: field 'The words and photos of everyone we work with are very important to us. We use them to tell people about the work we do. Would you help us, and other young people, by letting us talk to you and take your photos/videos? We’d like to tell your story in a way you are happy with. You don’t have to tell us anything you don’t want to, and if necessary, we can change your name. We are also always careful not to publish too much information about you, for instance, if we use your real name, we won’t say where you live. Your images, videos, and information will be used for non-profit purposes only, and we will not use them for anything other than what is mentioned in this consent form. We might use your words, photos and/or videos in: leaflets, posters, videos, press, magazines and other publications to show people what we do share them with other organisations we work with on the internet to show people what has been happening in the project. Once your photos and/or videos and information is on the Internet, people from all over the world will be able to see them. It is important to understand that laws in different countries are not the same so some countries do not have laws that will protect the information you provide. If we do take any pictures/videos of you, we'll keep them safely in Apnalaya’s repository and we'll use them from time to time. If you'd like us to discontinue using your photos or videos in the future, you can get in touch with us at admin@apnalaya.org (9833041074). By confirming consent, you agree to waive any right to inspect or approve the finished photographs, videos, or printed or electronic matter that may be used in conjunction with them now or in the future, as well as any right to royalties or other compensation arising from or related to the use of the media.' with data type 'Read Only'. What Avni concept type should this be?

Field: The words and photos of everyone we work with are very important to us. We use them to tell people about the work we do. You don’t have to tell us anything you don’t want to, and if necessary, we can change your name. We are also always careful not to publish too much information about you, for instance, if we use your real name, we won’t say where you live. Your images, videos, and information will be used for non-profit purposes only, and we will not use them for anything other than what is mentioned in this consent form. We might use your words, photos and/or videos in: leaflets, posters, videos, press, magazines and other publications to show people what we do share them with other organisations we work with on the internet to show people what has been happening in the project.
